title: Power tool stand
abstract: A power tool stand comprises a base; a projecting frame connected to the base; and a power tool carriage moveably mounted on the projecting frame. The power tool carriage comprises a first interface arranged to electrically connect with a removeable power tool and a second interface in electrical connection with the first interface and arranged to electrically connect with a removeable battery.
claims: 1. A power tool stand comprising: a base; a projecting frame connected to the base; and a power tool carriage moveably mounted on the projecting frame; wherein the power tool carriage comprises a first interface arranged to mechanically couple with a removeable power tool and a second interface arranged to electrically and mechanically couple with a removeable battery wherein the removable power tool and the removeable battery are respectively coupleable to the first interface and the second interface in the same direction.
